race.comment: ARISPHERE (2) is in the premier stable and brings strong relative form to resumption. Has been racing in better company in town and is proven fresh. Owns a Doomben trial win and has the speed to use the rails gate. Has a handy 2kg claim, and a bold run is likely. IMPACT ZONE (7) led narrowly beaten this grade at Eagle Farm first-up. Is 2/2 second-up and has more up the sleeve. A serious player. HEARTS ARE BETTER (1) is a leader who won at Ipswich before finding one 2.9L too good Eagle Farm at this level. The 2kg claim is handy but she will need some luck skipping over from an awkward gate. COUNT NICHOLAS (4) comes back in grade and is busting to win. The 2kg claim helps and he deserves another chance. HEART AND SPIRIT (8) has been going okay but below her best. Maps well and is well in with the 3kg claim. She's well in the mix. FINANCIALLY FAMOUS (9) resumes and is worth a look.
